video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. Lin Che pulls the cloth off the mirror., The reflection shows a version of himself that looks up half a second slower, but smiles first., The reflection speaks. Narration: "He pulls off the cloth. The person in the mirror looks up half a second slower, but smiles first.". Protagonist A (mirror reflection) says: "You finally came.". Camera motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift. Medium close-up of Lin Che's reflection in a dusty mirror, slight time delay effect, eerie smile, dim basement light, psychological horror, shallow depth of field. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

The reflection shows a version of himself that looks up half a second slower, but smiles first.

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S035/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
